utterance: What was the shooting percentage in the paint compared to above the break?
gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN ABS(x) <= 80 AND y <= 190 AND made_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN ABS(x) <= 80 AND y <= 190 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) as paint_pct, CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN y > 90 AND distance > 22 AND made_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN y > 90 AND distance > 22 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) as above_break_pct FROM shot_charts
predicted_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN made_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(*) AS paint_fg_pct FROM shot_charts WHERE ABS(x) <= 80 AND y <= 190
